__all__ = ["create_app", "get_version", "configure_logging"]

import os
import logging

from . import models
from . import views
from . import serializers


def create_app():
    os.environ.setdefault("APP_ENV", "production")
    logging.basicConfig(level=logging.INFO)
    app = App()
    app.register(models, views, serializers)
    return app


def get_version():
    return "1.0.0"


def configure_logging(level: int = logging.INFO):
    logging.basicConfig(level=level)
